body: The signal passes a compressor stage and then a limiter stage, so you can glue dynamics gently first and catch the remaining peaks with the brickwall limiter. Lookahead in the limiter delays the signal slightly so fast transients are caught before they clip.

A dedicated sidechain input lets another track duck this one for the classic pumping effect, while the built-in noise gate cleans up hiss or bleed below a threshold. Input, output and gain-reduction meters make the amount of processing visible.
